THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUNCH, PAUL AKA PAUL BRYANT MARCERON, NOAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 253 WEBSTER, STAYED UNTIL APR-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
